data.title: 国际服主线Vol.EX 第三章 Part1更新
data.summary: [Main Story Announcement] Main Story Ex. Decagrammaton Ch.3 「The Sky of Unity」 Part.1 is coming soon
data.body:
[Main Story Announcement]

Main Story Ex. Decagrammaton Ch.3 「The Sky of Unity」 Part.1 is coming soon, Sensei!

Please look forward to it!
